contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Grow for green shoots on a windowsill — bulb harvest needs deep outdoor soil.

notes: On a windowsill, grow for fresh green garlic shoots rather than bulbs. Plant a clove and harvest the greens. Full bulb harvest requires outdoor growing season. Softneck varieties store better; hardneck varieties have more complex flavour.
